examples: The production of these cancerous cells suppresses the production of normal white blood cells.
The reproduction and growth of the cancerous cells can be suppressed by bombarding them with radiation.
The conscience of the nation is appeased, while the population continues to puff its way to smoky, cancerous death.
So far, experiments that use Celebrex to fight cancerous and pre-cancerous growths are promising.
They have harnessed the power of lasers to find, map and non-invasively destruct cancerous tumors.
